motivation: Establish PQN performance baseline on 15-game Atari subset

motivation: Add LayerNorm to PPO NatureCNN — known plasticity intervention from CHAIN-SP paper

motivation: Add Normalize-and-Project to PQN — complement existing LayerNorm, top plasticity method from Plasticine
comment: 3-SEED 15/15 (full PQN baseline): 3W/1L/11T (net +2). WINS: MsPacman+46%, Phoenix(vs 0), Solaris+15%. LOSS: PrivateEye-1338%. BattleZone/Breakout downgraded to TIE with full baseline. Updated battlezone-s2/mspacman-s3/spaceinvaders-s1 to 40M.

motivation: Full CHAIN-SP approach: LayerNorm + churn reduction loss for PPO
comment: 3-SEED 15/15 (3 games at 2/3 seeds): 3W/2L/10T (net +1). WINS: Amidar+93%, BattleZone+30%, PrivateEye+167%. LOSSES: MsPacman-21%, NameThisGame-16%. Corrected with full baseline comparison.

motivation: DreamerV3-style symlog/symexp on value targets for scale-invariant learning
comment: 2W/2L/11T — Neutral. Closed.

motivation: Post-update weight shrinkage + noise for plasticity maintenance (proven in on-policy RL)
comment: COMPLETE 3-SEED 15/15: 4W/2L/9T (net +2). WINS: Amidar+78%, BattleZone+27%, PrivateEye+153%, Solaris+23%. LOSSES: MsPacman-22%, NameThisGame-12%. Corrected with full baseline comparison.

motivation: Add LSTM to PQN for memory-dependent games (Montezuma, Venture, etc.)
comment: CORRECTED 15/15 pilot + 2-seed Amidar/MsPacman/Qbert: 7W/5L/3T (net +2) vs PQN baseline. Prev 8W/3L overstated — BattleZone LOSS(-14%), Breakout LOSS(-11%) added. Amidar 2s avg q4=18.5 LOSS(-41%). MsPacman 2s avg q4=382 WIN(+53%). 3-seed eval ongoing (10 running, output-dir /output bug).

motivation: Random Network Distillation intrinsic motivation for hard exploration games
comment: 2W/3L/10T (net -1). Closed.

motivation: Replace NatureCNN with IMPALA ResNet encoder — stronger visual processing with residual connections
comment: 3/15 old-format only (unreliable q4). 6 running (incl. resubmissions). PrivateEye timed out at 4h — IMPALA CNN is slower. Need 8h walltime for remaining resubmissions.

motivation: Replace NatureCNN with IMPALA ResNet encoder for PQN baseline
comment: 2/15 new-format (BattleZone LOSS -20%, Phoenix WIN +18%) + 3 old-format. 7 running. PrivateEye timed out at 4h. Mixed early signal.

motivation: DrQ-style random shift augmentation — improves representation quality
comment: COMPLETE 3-SEED 15/15: 4W/1L/10T (net +3). WINS: Amidar+27%, BattleZone+13%, Phoenix+11%, PrivateEye+212%. LOSS: MsPacman-20%. Solaris-s3 q4=1613 confirms TIE(-5.3%). CONFIRMED BEST PPO single technique.

motivation: Spectral norm on CNN layers constrains Lipschitz constant, prevents rank collapse
comment: COMPLETE 3-SEED 15/15: 1W/0L/14T (net +1). Only WIN: PrivateEye+124%(3s). All 15 games at 3 seeds. Marginal improvement — not worth pursuing further. Closed.

motivation: Anneal entropy coef from 0.03 to 0.001 — high early exploration, low late exploitation
comment: 2W/2L/11T. Neutral. Closed.

motivation: Adaptive value function normalization for scale-invariant learning across games
comment: 1W/2L/12T. Solaris loss. Closed.

motivation: Random pruning 50% weights at init, static mask throughout training — ICML 2025 oral
comment: 2W/2L/11T. BattleZone +35%, PrivateEye +113%. Losses: MsPacman/Solaris. Neutral.

motivation: Replace PPO clipping with soft TV divergence penalty — ICLR 2025, simpler trust region
comment: 3W/2L/10T. Phoenix +14%, Qbert +15%. Losses: MsPacman -19%, PrivateEye -39%.

motivation: Schedule-Free optimizer eliminates LR annealing, maintains optimal implicit schedule — NeurIPS 2024
comment: Updated BattleZone s1 new-format q4=2464 (WIN +20%). Pilot new-format: 2W/3L/7T (net -1). Wins: Amidar +18%, BattleZone +20%. Losses: MsPacman, NameThisGame, PrivateEye. Closed.

motivation: Muon uses Newton-Schulz orthogonalization on gradients for matrix-shaped params
comment: 15/15 pilot COMPLETE: 3W/2L/10T (net +1). WINS: Amidar +81%, BattleZone +20%, Solaris +14%. LOSSES: MsPacman -17%, PrivateEye -58%. Weak positive. PrivateEye loss unusual (most techniques improve it). Closed.

motivation: Separate value and advantage streams for better value estimation — adapted for actor-critic
comment: Pilot new-format: 2W/4L/6T (net -2). Wins: BattleZone +15%, Phoenix +12%. Losses: DoubleDunk -35%, MsPacman -21%, NameThisGame -16%, PrivateEye -46%. Closed.

motivation: Combine h013 (SpectralNorm) and h012 (DrQ aug)
comment: Final 11/15 pilot: 2W/1L/8T (net +1). Breakout +11%, PrivateEye +170% wins but underperforms h012 alone (net+4). SpectNorm+DrQ combination adds nothing. Closed.

motivation: Replace scalar V(s) with N-quantile distributional value head
comment: 14/15 pilot: 5W/1L/8T (net +4). WINS: Amidar+14%(trivial 2.5vs2.2), BattleZone+20%, NameThisGame+11%, PrivateEye+156%, Solaris+21%(NEW). LOSS: MsPacman-19%. Qbert TIE(-10%). 1 remaining: DoubleDunk (running). NOW BEST PPO SINGLE TECHNIQUE at net+4, surpassing h012(net+3).

motivation: Combine SpectralNorm (h013) with S&P (h007) — dual plasticity mechanism
comment: CORRECTED 11/15 pilot: 1W/2L/8T (net -1). BattleZone +33% only WIN. Solaris -22%, SpaceInvaders -11% LOSSES. Amidar +5.5% was TIE not WIN (Qbert was also false WIN). Combination underperforms both individual techniques. Closed.

motivation: NeurIPS 2024 — constrain feature drift via L2 loss on pre-activation changes
comment: CLOSED at 12/15 pilot. 3W/2L/7T (net +1). BattleZone +15% new WIN. Phoenix +12%. Amidar +51% old-format (unreliable). MsPacman -16%, PrivateEye -46% LOSSES. Neutral after correction.

motivation: Two V-heads, min(V1,V2) for conservative advantage. TD3 double-Q trick for PPO.
comment: CLOSED. 10/15 pilot with mixed 10M/40M data. 3W/2L/5T (net +1). Breakout +618% (suspicious old-format), Amidar +92%, PrivateEye +19%. Losses: MsPacman -19%, NameThisGame -19%.

motivation: Combine LSTM (h008) + NaP (h004). NaP excludes LSTM params to preserve gates.
comment: CLOSED: 3/15 pilot. amidar=0, qbert=0 (CATASTROPHIC vs PQN baseline 31.6/151). breakout=2.0. Combination destroys learning. Likely NaP interferes with LSTM gradient flow.

motivation: Combine top-2 PPO techniques: h012 (DrQ net+2) and h007 (S&P net+2) — both improve PrivateEye/BattleZone
comment: 5/15 pilot: 3W/1L/1T (net +2). WINS: Amidar+1309%(1s), Phoenix+11%(1s), PrivateEye+113%(1s). LOSS: Breakout-100%(1s). 2 running (enduro, montezumarevenge).

description: PPO + DrQ Augmentation + Quantile Regression Value
motivation: Combine top-2 PPO techniques: DrQ (h012 net+3) improves representations, QR-Value (h022 net+2) improves value estimation. Complementary mechanisms.
comment: CLOSED. 9/15 pilot: 0W/1L/8T (net -1) new-format only. Amidar corrected from old-format q4=31→new-format q4=2.12 (TIE). Phoenix LOSS(-18%). All 8 remaining jobs cancelled. Negative synergy — worse than either technique alone.

motivation: NOVEL: Risk-sensitive advantage estimation via CVaR of quantile predictions. Alpha anneals 0.25→1.0 (pessimistic baseline early → standard mean late). Creates optimistic advantages for exploration.
comment: 8/15 pilot new-format: 2W/1L/4T (net +1) at 7/15 scored. WINS: BattleZone+40%, PrivateEye+93%. LOSS: MsPacman-11%. 7 running (alien, doubledunk, enduro, namethisgame, phoenix, solaris, spaceinvaders). CVaR beats h028(net-1) validating contribution.

motivation: Replace ReLU penultimate layer with product-of-softmax groups. Forces sparse structured representations on a product of simplices. Based on arXiv:2510.13704 — shown to improve PPO on Atari.
comment: 4/15 pilot: 2W/1L/1T (net +1). Phoenix q4=915 WIN(+15% NEW). Amidar MASSIVE WIN(+1418%). Breakout LOSS(-37%). Qbert TIE. 11 still running.

motivation: NOVEL: Adapt SPR (ICLR 2021) from off-policy to on-policy PPO. Adds auxiliary loss training encoder to predict own future latents via transition model + EMA target. First on-policy SPR implementation.
comment: 3/15 pilot (curve q4): 3W/0L/0T (net +3). Amidar q4=2.56 WIN(+16%), Breakout q4=1.94 WIN(+39%), Qbert q4=199 WIN(+26%). VERY PROMISING — all 3 wins. 12 running.

motivation: Replace linear layers in actor/critic heads with factorized NoisyLinear — parametric noise for state-dependent exploration, replaces entropy-based exploration
comment: 3/15 pilot (curve q4): 1W/1L/1T (net 0). Amidar q4=38.8 MASSIVE WIN (+1664%), Breakout q4=0.90 LOSS (-36%), Qbert q4=165 TIE. Mixed signal. 10 running.

motivation: NOVEL: Add explicit augmentation consistency loss to DrQ — force augmented and clean features to align. Asymmetric (detach clean, backprop through augmented). Related to BYOL/VICReg but for on-policy RL.
comment: 3/15 pilot (curve q4): 1W/0L/2T (net +1). Amidar q4=34.0 WIN (+1444%), Breakout q4=1.28 TIE, Qbert q4=154 TIE. DrQ + consistency loss. 10 running.
